reason: The packed SF Intermosaic outlines, authored 20-face output, curve-only mode, empty mode, reset behavior, and all 119 reachable node handlers now match Blender. The VM omits Blender's 24 loose/bookkeeping vertices in the authored fill output.
validation: Thirteen Blender/browser cases cover editable text, size, alignment, character and line spacing, word wrapping, all fill modes, and reset-letter behavior. Authored bounds differ by 1.151 units; surface vertex deltas stay at or below 14.93%.
